rationale: Hand-porting the Hanson 2019 Spatial-Offset-DSGC model overlaps t0023 (Port Hanson 2019 DSGC), which remains intervention_blocked pending t0022 outcomes. t0022 is now complete, but the substrate choice for any further DSGC port is under review (t0034-07 recommends t0024 as the preferred substrate). Deprioritising to medium keeps the suggestion available as an alternate plan without implying that a standalone hand-port task should be spawned ahead of resolving t0023's disposition.
